_comment: Head & neck: brainstem, parotid_L, parotid_R, mandible, spinal_cord (6 classes incl. background).
_note_class_weights: Median-frequency balancing. Approx voxel fractions: brainstem~1.5%, parotid_L~1%, parotid_R~1%, mandible~3%, spinal_cord~0.8%. Run scripts/compute_class_weights.py to recompute from your training split.
